name: Fleet Complete Fleet Management API
what_it_does: Fleet Complete fleet management and telematics REST API for vehicle tracking, driver behavior, ELD compliance, and field service coordination. Enables AI agents to manage real-time vehicle location and GPS tracking for fleet visibility automation, handle driver behavior monitoring (speeding, harsh braking, idling) for safety and fuel management, access ELD (Electronic Logging Device) HOS compliance data for DOT compliance automation, retrieve vehicle diagnostics and fault code monitoring for predictive maintenance, manage driver document and inspection (DVIR) workflow for vehicle safety compliance, handle asset tracking and equipment management for construction and industrial fleet, access temperature and cargo monitoring for cold chain and sensitive cargo tracking, retrieve geofence zone entry/exit events for territory and delivery automation, manage driver messaging and dispatch coordination for field service communication, and integrate Fleet Complete with logistics TMS, HR, and maintenance management platforms.
use_cases: Tracking vehicles from fleet operations agents
Monitoring HOS compliance from DOT compliance agents
Alerting on driver behavior from fleet safety agents
Managing maintenance from predictive fleet agents
not_for: Consumer vehicle tracking without commercial fleet
Air or rail transportation fleet without road vehicle focus
Small personal vehicle tracking without commercial operations
best_when: A trucking company, field service organization, construction fleet, or delivery operation wanting AI agents to automate vehicle tracking, HOS compliance monitoring, driver safety scoring, DVIR inspections, and fleet maintenance scheduling.
avoid_when: FMCSA HOS ACCURACY FOR DOT COMPLIANCE: Automated ELD HOS data reporting must accurately reflect actual driving, on-duty, and off-duty time; automated HOS calculation errors create FMCSA violation, driver out-of-service, and carrier safety rating risk. Driver privacy and NLRA employee monitoring rights — automated driver location tracking and behavior monitoring must comply with NLRA collective bargaining rights and state employee monitoring notice requirements; automated monitoring without required disclosure creates labor law exposure. CCPA/state privacy for driver location data — automated storage and use of precise driver location data must comply with CCPA and state location data privacy laws; automated indefinite retention of granular location data creates privacy liability. Cold chain temperature exceedance — automated temperature alert without human response protocol creates cargo loss claim exposure; automated alerting without defined escalation and response procedure for temperature exceedance creates shipper liability.

auth.notes: Fleet Complete uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario HQ. Founded 2000. Private (Sumitomo Corporation investment). North American commercial fleet management leader. 500,000+ connected assets. ELD FMCSA registered. Competes with Samsara, Verizon Connect, and Geotab for fleet telematics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-vehicle monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-vehicle monthly subscription; hardware telematics device + software subscription
pricing.notes: Toronto Ontario. Sumitomo investment. Founded 2000. 500,000+ connected assets. ELD FMCSA registered. North American commercial fleet focus. Per-vehicle subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; real-time location data streaming rate limits per vehicle count

known_agent_gotchas: FMCSA ELD HOS CALCULATION ACCURACY: Automated ELD HOS duty status calculation must correctly classify driving, on-duty not driving, sleeper berth, and off-duty time; automated HOS miscalculation creates FMCSA hours of service violation, driver out-of-service order, and carrier safety rating impact

Driver monitoring disclosure requirements — automated driver behavior monitoring (location, speeding, braking) must comply with state-specific employee monitoring notice requirements; in some states and for union drivers, monitoring without disclosure creates NLRA and state labor law exposure

DVIR electronic signature — automated DVIR (Driver Vehicle Inspection Report) pre-trip and post-trip inspection completion must capture driver electronic signature; automated DVIR submission without driver signature does not meet FMCSA 396.11 inspection report requirements

Cold chain temperature alert escalation — automated temperature exceedance alerts must trigger defined human response protocol within carrier-specified timeframe; automated alerting without response protocol and documentation creates cargo damage liability without mitigation evidence

Real-time location data retention — granular GPS location data retained beyond operational necessity creates state location privacy law exposure (California, Virginia, Colorado); implement automated retention schedule aligned with state privacy requirements

ELD data tampering prevention — automated ELD data extraction must preserve FMCSA data integrity; automated manipulation or alteration of ELD logs creates federal tampering violation and carrier deactivation risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet telematics. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Vehicle location, driver behavior, and ELD compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet management. SOC2, FMCSA ELD. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Driver location and telematics data.
